const unicode = require('../lib/unicode') module.exports = { isSpaceSeparator (c) { return typeof c === 'string' && unicode.Space_Separator.test(c) }, isIdStartChar (c) { return typeof c === 'string' && ( (c >= 'a' && c <= 'z') || (c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') || (c === '$') || (c === '_') || unicode.ID_Start.test(c) ) }, isIdContinueChar (c) { return typeof c === 'string' && ( (c >= 'a' && c <= 'z') || (c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') || (c >= '0' && c <= '9') || (c === '$') || (c === '_') || (c === '\u200C') || (c === '\u200D') || unicode.ID_Continue.test(c) ) }, isDigit (c) { return typeof c === 'string' && /[0-9]/.test(c) }, isHexDigit (c) { return typeof c === 'string' && /[0-9A-Fa-f]/.test(c) }, }
